name: Instagram Posts
description: User's Instagram posts including images, captions, engagement counts, media type, location, and top likers when available.

posts.description: Array of posts in reverse chronological order

pk.description: Instagram primary key for the post

code.description: Short code used in the post permalink (instagram.com/p/<code>)

taken_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of when the post was published

img_url.description: Best-effort primary image URL for the post (or first carousel image, or video thumbnail)

caption.description: Post caption text (empty string if no caption)

num_of_likes.description: Total number of likes on the post

comment_count.description: Total number of comments on the post

is_video.description: True if the post contains video media

video_url.description: URL of the highest-quality video version, when this is a video post

carousel_count.description: Number of media items in the carousel, when this is a carousel post

who_liked.description: Top likers shown in the facepile (only populated for the viewer's own recent posts)
